title: KoHs Inv Cursor
description: Customize where your mouse appears when opening inventory, with a full-screen editor and real inventory reference.
body:
## KoHs Inv Cursor **KoHs Mod Suite Dev** KoHs Inv Cursor lets you choose exactly where your mouse appears when opening inventory. ### Preview

### Dependencies - Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Requires [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ### Notes - Client-side only. - No cheats or unfair multiplayer automation.
